Hey there! I remember working on this — your Agent Office dashboard at `localhost:3100`. Let me explain what's going on so we can fix this together.

**How spawning currently works:**

There are **two modes** in the code right now:

1. **Native Claude API (Claude Pro/Max)** — the server spawns agents *directly in the background* using Node's `spawn()` — no `.command` file needed at all. It's fully automatic.

2. **OpenRouter** (what you're using with `qwen3.6-plus`) — the Claude CLI can't do context management with OpenRouter. So when you hit spawn, it just *registers* the agent in the dashboard (shows as "registered"), and you'd resume it manually with `claude -r <team-name>`. The `.command` file that gets offered is just a convenience for macOS to open Terminal tabs for all agents.

**Your question — can you launch models without `.command` files?**

<tool_use_error>String to replace not found in file.
String: // API: Open a single agent's Terminal tab
// Returns the command — frontend will use a download trick to trigger Terminal.app
app.post('/api/launch/:name', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const teamName = req.params.name;
    const teamConfigPath = path.join(TEAMS_DIR, teamName, 'config.json');

    if (!fs.existsSync(teamConfigPath)) {
      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Team not found' });
    }

    const config = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(teamConfigPath, 'utf8'));
    const member = config.members[0];
    const claudePath = path.join(process.env.HOME, '.local', 'bin', 'claude');
    const isTrevor = member.name.toLowerCase() === 'trevor';
    let cmd = `cd "${__dirname}" && CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 ${claudePath} -r ${teamName}`;
    if (isTrevor) cmd += ' --agent=trevor';
    cmd += ' --permission-mode acceptEdits';

    // Mark as launched
    member.backgroundId = `${member.name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '-')}-launched-${Date.now()}`;
    fs.writeFileSync(teamConfigPath, JSON.stringify(config, null, 2));

    res.json({ success: true, message: `Launching ${member.name}...`, command: cmd });
  } catch (err) {
    res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: err.message });
  }
});</tool_use_error>

String: // Open a new Terminal.app window (minimized) and run the agent command.
// All windows are collected and miniaturized after a short delay.
function openTerminalTab(title, command) {
  const agentDir = path.join(__dirname, '.agents');
  if (!fs.existsSync(agentDir)) fs.mkdirSync(agentDir, { recursive: true });

  const safeName = title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '-');
  const shellFile = path.join(agentDir, `${safeName}.sh`);
  fs.writeFileSync(shellFile, `#!/bin/bash\nset -e\necho "=== Agent: ${title} ==="\n${command}\n`, 'utf8');
  fs.chmodSync(shellFile, '755');

  // Just open the window — caller will miniaturize in batch
  const appleScript = `tell application "Terminal"
    do script "${shellFile}"
end tell
`;
  const scriptFile = path.join(agentDir, `${safeName}.scpt`);
  fs.writeFileSync(scriptFile, appleScript, 'utf8');

  try {
    execSync(`osascript "${scriptFile}"`, { stdio: 'pipe', timeout: 10000 });
    return true;
  } catch (e) {
    console.error(`Failed to open Terminal for ${title}: ${e.message}`);
    return false;
  }
}

// Miniaturize all Terminal windows using System Events (more reliable than the miniaturized property)
function miniaturizeAllWindows() {
  // Use System Events to set all Terminal windows to miniaturized
  // This is more reliable than the AppleScript miniaturized property on new windows
  const appleScript = `tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Terminal"
      repeat with w in (every window)
        set value of attribute "AXMinimized" of w to true
      end repeat
    end tell
end tell`;
  const agentDir = path.join(__dirname, '.agents');
  const scriptFile = path.join(agentDir, `mini-${Date.now()}.scpt`);
  fs.writeFileSync(scriptFile, appleScript, 'utf8');
  try {
    execSync(`osascript "${scriptFile}"`, { stdio: 'pipe', timeout: 30000 });
    try { fs.unlinkSync(scriptFile); } catch {}
  } catch (e) {
    // Fallback: try the AppleScript way
    console.error(`System Events miniaturize failed, falling back: ${e.message}`);
    const fallbackScript = `tell application "Terminal"
    delay 1
    repeat with targetWin in (every window)
      try
        set miniaturized of targetWin to true
      end try
    end repeat
end tell`;
    const fbScriptFile = path.join(agentDir, `mini-fb-${Date.now()}.scpt`);
    fs.writeFileSync(fbScriptFile, fallbackScript, 'utf8');
    try {
      execSync(`osascript "${fbScriptFile}"`, { stdio: 'pipe', timeout: 15000 });
      try { fs.unlinkSync(fbScriptFile); } catch {}
    } catch {}
  }
}</tool_use_error>
